_comment: ROG Monitor device profiles. Each entry describes the power/clock control surface for a specific laptop model.
_custom_override: Create ~/.config/rog-monitor/device.json with the same structure to override the active profile. The 'id' field must match the auto-detected device or be 'custom'.

controls.description_es: Potencia CPU sostenida (TDP largo plazo). Reducir protege batería/temperatura a costa de rendimiento base.
controls.description_en: Sustained CPU power limit (long-term TDP). Lowering saves battery/temperature at the cost of sustained performance.

controls.description_es: Potencia CPU en ráfaga (~2 min). Controla picos de carga cortos.
controls.description_en: CPU burst power limit (~2 min). Controls short load spikes.

controls.description_es: Vatios extra que la GPU puede tomar del presupuesto de la CPU cuando el CPU está subutilizado.
controls.description_en: Extra watts the GPU can take from CPU budget when CPU is underutilised.

controls.description_es: Temperatura máxima permitida para la GPU. El firmware hace throttling al alcanzarla. 87 °C es el límite del firmware.
controls.description_en: Maximum allowed GPU temperature. Firmware throttles at this point. 87 °C is the firmware hard ceiling.

controls.reason: Requiere sesión X11 con Coolbits; no disponible en Wayland
controls.reason_en: Requires X11 session with Coolbits; not available on Wayland
controls.description_es: Offset de frecuencia del núcleo GPU vía nvidia-settings. Bloqueado en Wayland.
controls.description_en: GPU core clock offset via nvidia-settings. Blocked on Wayland.

controls.reason: Requiere sesión X11 con Coolbits; no disponible en Wayland
controls.reason_en: Requires X11 session with Coolbits; not available on Wayland
controls.description_es: Offset de frecuencia de memoria GPU vía nvidia-settings. Bloqueado en Wayland.
controls.description_en: GPU memory clock offset via nvidia-settings. Blocked on Wayland.

devices.name: Genérico (auto-detectado)
devices._comment: Ranges are read live from sysfs at runtime; defaults below are placeholders overridden by live reads.

controls.reason_en: Requires X11 session with Coolbits; not available on Wayland
